name: example-minimal
description: Template contract for this repository: the minimum artifacts every skill must ship (SKILL.md, skill.json, evals/*) so static checks catch a templated skill that bypasses gates. Hidden from `npx skills add . --list` by `metadata.internal: true`. Do not delete.

inspired_by.name: Agent Skills (agentskills.io)
inspired_by.author: Anthropic
inspired_by.contribution: SKILL.md format with YAML frontmatter; progressive disclosure (~100-token metadata at startup, full instructions on trigger).
